metadata.title: Turning a 1v3 Into a Clean Triple Kill with Smart Angles in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Watch how quick thinking and precise shots flip the odds in this intense 1v3 moment. What’s your favorite agent for clutch plays?

Share your best come-from-behind wins below!
